videoSnippet.title: "Don't Move Until You See It!" || Divya vs Vaishali || FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Lotus Chess April Arena https://lichess.org/tournament/nT0JRnZV
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/
https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments

Divya Deshmukh (2497) - Vaishali, Rameshbabu (2470) 
FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [02] 2026.03.30
D31 Queen's Gambit Declined, 3.Nc3

1.c4 e6 2.Nc3 d5 3.d4 h6 4.cxd5 exd5 5.Bf4 c6 6.e3 Bd6 7.Bxd6 Qxd6 8.Bd3 Ne7 9.Qc2 O-O 10.Nf3 Nd7 11.O-O Nf6 12.h3 g6 13.Rab1 a5 14.Na4 Bf5 15.Nc5 Qc7 16.Rfc1 Nd7 17.Na4 Rfe8 18.Nc3 Qd6 19.Ne2 Qf6 20.Nf4 Bxd3 21.Nxd3 Nf5 22.b4 Nd6 23.a4 Qe7 24.bxa5 Rxa5 25.Rb4 Rea8 26.Rcb1 R8a7 27.Qb3 Qd8 28.Nfe5 Kg7 29.Qd1 Qe7 30.Qb3 Qd8 31.Qd1 Qe7 32.Nxd7 Qxd7 33.Nc5 Qc8 34.Qf3 Ne4 35.Rxb7 Rxb7 36.Rxb7 Ng5 37.Qg3 Rxc5 38.Qe5+ Kh7 39.Rb8 Rc1+ 40.Kh2 Qxh3+ 41.gxh3 Nf3+ 42.Kg2 Nxe5 43.dxe5 Ra1 44.Ra8

0:01 Hello Everyone!
02:50 Game Starts
04:30 Completely New Game
05:50 Awesome Photo!!
11:10 Pause the Video!
14:30 IWITP!
15:30 Standings after ROUND 2
16:00 Legends of the Channel!
